com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit

  • Deprecated. 
    This interface should not be used as there is no object of this type available or accessible in the system. Please use XGraphicsUnit instead.

    @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit
    See Also:
    XGraphicsUnit

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit.IXHarnessPhysicalUnitType
      Deprecated. 
      X_MM means the unit is in "mm" X_CM means the unit is in "cm" X_INCH means the unit is in "inch" X_PIN means the unit is on Pin Grid.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      double getPhysicalUnitsPerMeter()
      Deprecated. 
      Gets the unit of the physical mapping of the harness diagram in terms of units per Meter.
      IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit.IXHarnessPhysicalUnitType getPhysicalUnitType()
      Deprecated. 
      Gets the type of physical mapping of the harness diagram.
      double getPhysicalUnitValue()
      Deprecated. 
      Gets the value of the physical mapping of the harness diagram.

    • Method Detail

      • getPhysicalUnitType

        IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit.IXHarnessPhysicalUnitType getPhysicalUnitType()
        Deprecated. 
        Gets the type of physical mapping of the harness diagram. IXPhysicalUnitType.X_None is returned if not able to get the physical unit type.
        Returns:
        IXPhysicalUnitType enum type

      • getPhysicalUnitValue

        double getPhysicalUnitValue()
        Deprecated. 
        Gets the value of the physical mapping of the harness diagram. -1.0 is returned in case of any failure to get the value.

        Example: if getPhysicalUnitType returns X_CM and getPhysicalUnitValue returns 0.3 then one dataunit of a harness diagram data is 0.3cm

        if getPhysicalUnitPerMeter returns 40 and getPhysicalUnitValue returns 0.4 then one dataunit of a harness diagram data is 0.4/40 meter = 1cm

        Returns:
        double

      • getPhysicalUnitsPerMeter

        double getPhysicalUnitsPerMeter()
        Deprecated. 
        Gets the unit of the physical mapping of the harness diagram in terms of units per Meter. If the value returned is 20 then it means that 1 unit of this mapping is 0.05 meters. -1.0 is returned in case of any failure to get the value.
        Returns:
        double
